profile.name: Karan Chandnahu
profile.title: Engineering Student & Aspiring Data Scientist
profile.intro: I build clean, purposeful software and explore how data can tell better stories — currently sharpening my craft one project at a time.

about.intro: I'm a final-year engineering student who fell in love with building things that solve real, if small, problems — a habit tracker that actually got used, a script that saved a friend three hours of manual work.
about.journey: My path started with curiosity about how apps worked under the hood, grew into web development, and more recently into data science, where I enjoy the moment a pile of numbers turns into a clear insight.
about.goals: I'm working toward a role where I can ship product-quality software and lean on data to make better decisions — ideally somewhere that still feels like a small team.

strengths.title: Problem solving
strengths.desc: I enjoy breaking down messy, ambiguous problems into small, solvable pieces.

strengths.title: Quick learning
strengths.desc: Comfortable picking up new tools and frameworks fast when a project needs it.

strengths.title: Communication
strengths.desc: Can explain technical ideas clearly to both technical and non-technical people.

strengths.title: Leadership
strengths.desc: Led a 4-person team through a semester-long capstone project, on time.

strengths.title: Creativity
strengths.desc: I like finding the less obvious, more elegant way to solve a problem.

strengths.title: Adaptability
strengths.desc: Comfortable shifting priorities and tech stacks as a project evolves.

strengths.title: Teamwork
strengths.desc: I default to over-communicating and documenting so teammates are never blocked.

timeline.title: B.Tech in Computer science engineering with specialisation Data Science
timeline.org: Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and Technology, Raipur

social.tagline: Building things, one line of code at a time.
